title: Modern Multitools
body:
Once this datapack is loaded, all the following recipes will be shown:

### Putting your same-material-tools\(axe + pickaxe + hoe + shovel\) shapelessly to *CRAFT* Multitools.

Hint: Netherite Multitools should be **crafted** instead of being ~~smithed~~.

(Now you can regret from your wrong way in v1.4+.)

- Multitools have 4 times max-durability as its original tool, and is efficient for [*Extra Blocks*](#Extra-Blocks).

- In order to make use of some special uses(e.g. make path by shovel), put your multitool in your mainhand then press swapoffhand key(default: F) to switch tools(even sword).

#### Extra-Blocks
Glass & Glass Pane, Heads, Wool & Wool Carpet, Beds, Candles, Cake, Honeycomb Block, Sea Lantern, Glowstone, Redstone Lamp, Powder Snow, Cactus, Turtle Egg, Sniffer Egg, Froglight, Cobweb & Beacon.

### Putting your any-material-sword + shield + iron_ingot to *SMITH* sword-with-shield-upgrade. (MC 1.21.5+)

- Multitools can also get an extra shield upgrade, but is needed to switch to sword first.

The durability of the sword won't be changed when got a shield upgrade.

Source

https://github.com/JesKi13567/Modern-Multitools

By JK137
